global_description: Large mammal with a long neck, humped back, and sandy brown fur. It has long legs, a small head with a split upper lip, and large, padded feet adapted for desert terrain.

part_details.head: Small with a split upper lip and large eyes
part_details.neck: Long and slender, connecting head to body
part_details.hump: Large, rounded, located on the back
part_details.legs: Long and sturdy, adapted for walking on sand
part_details.feet: Large and padded, preventing sinking in sand
